items: Agentic automation democratizing AI in 2026 - companies with right governance foundation will transform availability into advantage (Blue Prism)
UiPath 2026 report: companies rethinking how people, robots, and AI agents work together
Key trends: multimodal AI, agentic workflows, edge computing, privacy-preserving technologies, strong governance (Mean CEO, 4 days ago)
Risk of 'agent washing': only ~130 of thousands of claimed 'AI agent' vendors are building genuinely agentic systems (MLMastery)
Organizations shifting from experimentation to validation phase
Focus on proving what works vs. what is possible
No /skills/research/ directory found - skill development opportunity
Research tools available: auto-research.js, intelligent_research.py, tavily_search.py
Research INDEX.md shows focus on: KNOWLEDGE_OVERVIEW, SYSTEM_DOCS, ai_automation_architecture

next_actions: Propose creation of /skills/research/ with search templates for common research patterns
Monitor 'agent washing' trend - potential value for EmpireHazeClaw differentiation messaging
Track Mean CEO AI automation trends (published April 2026) for ongoing updates
